# SpanishTVShows.com

> Best Spanish-language TV shows ranked by real audience data. Crime, drama, novelas from Spain, Mexico, Colombia, Argentina.

SpanishTVShows.com ranks Spanish-language television series by real viewer data, country of origin, and genre. Coverage includes shows from Spain, Mexico, Colombia, Argentina, and other Latin American countries.

## Key Pages
- [All Rankings](https://spanishtvshows.com/rankings)
- [Shows by Country](https://spanishtvshows.com/countries)
- [Genres: Crime, Drama, Novelas](https://spanishtvshows.com/genres)
- [About](https://spanishtvshows.com/about)
- [Contact](https://spanishtvshows.com/contact)

## Coverage
- Spain: Money Heist, Elite, Paquita Salas, Sky Rojo
- Mexico: Club de Cuervos, La Casa de las Flores, Luis Miguel
- Colombia: Narcos, Sin Senos Sí Hay Paraíso
- Argentina: El Marginal, El Reino
